description:
Dear YouTube Family 

one incident with me and that incident am share with you 
I hope this video will help you in future 

if @ICICILombard not able release claim till 29th March 2023.

it means they are doing cheating with customers but if they are realse my claim will definitely told you and will delete this video from YouTube. Thanks


we are buying insurance for safety.

Tech Kharche
